title: Module 1
content:
Layered Tasks in Communication, OSI model, Digital signals,
Transmission impairments, Performance measures, Transmission modes.

title: Module 2
content:
Physical Layer - Guided and unguided media, different switched networks.
Data Link Layer: Framing, Flow and Error Control, HDLC, PPP, random
and controlled access, IEEE standards for wired and wireless LAN.

title: Module 3
content:
Network Layer - Logical addressing, Internet Protocol, unicast and
multicast routing protocols, ICMP.
Transport Layer: UDP, TCP, SCTP, Congestion control

title: Module 4
content:
Application Layer - Name space, DNS, remote logging, SMTP, POP, FTP,
HTTP, SNMP, RTP, Security in Internet
